Page 7 of 7

MODULE 7 · Final Summary

07

Course Conclusion

What You've Learned

Congratulations! You have completed W1. AI Foundations and Responsible Use.&nbsp;

Let's recap what we have added to your toolkit:&nbsp;

  1. The Reality Check: You know AI is a "prediction engine," not a truth machine. It can hallucinate.

  2. The Red Lines: You know NEVER to put PII (names, IDs) or sensitive data into a public tool.

  3. The Decision Matrix: You have a checklist (Red/Amber/Green) to decide when to use AI.

  4. The R-C-T Formula: You can write prompts that actually work (Role, Context, Task).

What Now?

You have the "Foundation." Now it is time to build on it. The next workshop in this series is AI for Daily Workflows.

In that session, we will stop talking about theory and start using AI to clear your inbox, summarize minutes, and automate the boring parts of your day.
